hero.subtitle: Experience dental care like a premium wellness retreat, with a dedicated team of specialists and the world's leading technology.
hero.imageAlt: Professional dental specialist in a modern clinic, warm and airy space with minimalist emerald accents

services.title: We blend aesthetic artistry with restorative science to deliver the most lasting results for your smile.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.desc: The most optimal solution for missing teeth today, restoring 100% of chewing function and natural aesthetics.
items.imageAlt: Close-up of a modern dental implant procedure model in a high-tech clinic

items.title: Invisalign Braces
items.desc: Bracket-free orthodontics that is completely invisible and comfortable throughout treatment.

items.title: Cosmetic Porcelain Veneers
items.desc: Ultra-thin porcelain veneers that preserve your natural teeth while delivering a radiant, beautiful smile.

items.title: General Dentistry
items.desc: Regular checkups, fillings, and painless ultrasonic scaling and cleaning.
items.imageAlt: Woman smiling radiantly after a successful dental treatment in a warm, sun-drenched setting

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: We guarantee no hidden costs throughout your treatment. 0% interest installment plans available on every service.

items.name: Mr. Minh Hoang
items.quote: I used to be terrified of the dentist until I came to Nha Khoa An Nhiên. The space is truly as relaxing as a spa, and the doctors explain everything carefully and gently. I'm completely satisfied with my new porcelain veneers.

items.name: Ms. Lan Phuong
items.quote: The Invisalign treatment here is very professional. Every visit feels like a moment to unwind. Thank you to the Nha Khoa An Nhiên team for helping me feel so much more confident.

items.name: Mrs. Thu Van
items.quote: I was worried about getting implants at my age, but the doctor was so gentle. Now I can enjoy eating just like before. The facility here is spotless and modern.

cta.subtitle: Book your appointment today to receive a 20% discount on porcelain veneer and implant services.

footer.desc: Preserving Vietnamese smiles with dedication and leading technology. We're proud to be a trusted companion on your family's oral health journey.
